description: Real-world school digest with Valentine's Day party photos (past) and newsletter with future author visit

input_summary.subject: Feb 12, 2026 Digest: 2 new messages from Walnut Heights School today

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Author visit at school with book signing. Books can be pre-ordered through Rakestraw Bookstore.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.description: TK and K music showcase. Livestream available.

events.title: No School - Presidents Day
events.description: No School: Presidents Day. No classes for students on February 12–16, 2026.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.description: Spring Music Showcase for TK and Kindergarten students. Event at Walnut Heights at 9:30 am in the MPR to see what TK and Kindergarten students have been working on in Music class. A livestream will be sent out a few days before the event. Any questions, contact Mrs. Gold at jcousins@walnutcreeksd.org.

events.title: Author Visit Date Change
events.description: Two authors will visit the school on March 12 (date was changed). If you want to pre-order a book for your child to have signed, follow the ordering details provided by Rakestraw Bookstore. The books will be delivered on the day of the visit; authors will sign them for students. This note serves as a date change notice.
